label: Transporter comp
description: Comp properties for things that can load and carry cargo or pawns as a transport container.

massCapacity.label: Mass capacity
massCapacity.description: Maximum total mass in kg that this transporter can carry.

restEffectiveness.label: Rest effectiveness
restEffectiveness.description: How effectively pawns inside rest while being transported. 0 means no rest gain.

max1PerGroup.label: Max 1 per group
max1PerGroup.description: If true, only one transporter of this type can be included per launch group.

canChangeAssignedThingsAfterStarting.label: Can change assigned things after starting
canChangeAssignedThingsAfterStarting.description: If true, the cargo manifest can be edited after a launch countdown has begun.

showOverallStats.label: Show overall stats
showOverallStats.description: If true, aggregate group stats (total mass, capacity) are shown in the transporter UI.

pawnLoadedSound.label: Pawn loaded sound
pawnLoadedSound.description: Sound played when a pawn enters and boards this transporter.

pawnExitSound.label: Pawn exit sound
pawnExitSound.description: Sound played when a pawn disembarks from this transporter.

shouldTickContents.label: Should tick contents
shouldTickContents.description: If true, things stored inside this transporter continue to tick while in transit.

showMassInInspectString.label: Show mass in inspect string
showMassInInspectString.description: If true, current cargo mass is displayed in the inspect panel for this transporter.
